title: Step 100: Top-K on CIFAR-100 validation

content.purpose: Validate top-k readout on harder dataset (Split-CIFAR-100, 20 tasks, frozen ResNet-18 features d=512).
content.method: Same TopKFold system with spawn threshold adjusted to 0.95 for ResNet feature space.
content.result: PASSES readout. top-k(5) 38.3% AA vs 1-NN 32.3% (+6.1pp). FAILS forgetting (11.6pp). Spawn threshold 0.95 needed for ResNet features.
content.key_insight: Spawn threshold is feature-space dependent. Cosine range varies across embedding spaces.

constraints_implied: fc013: Spawn threshold must be calibrated per feature space
